trigger.title: [Cockpit] Add Repo Status Dashboard Cards
trigger.body:
## Summary

Replace the top-level summary cards (Roadmap, Launch, Product Velocity) with three collapsible repo status cards showing active coding pipeline work.

## Changes

### 1. Remove Existing Cards
- Remove "Roadmap" card
- Remove "Launch" card  
- Remove "Product Velocity" card

### 2. Add Repo Status Cards (3 cards, full width, collapsible)

Each repo card shows a table with active issues:

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Issue | Number + title (truncated) |
| CodeRabbit | Status: 🟡 Waiting / 🟢 Plan created / 🔵 Feedback provided / ✅ Passed |
| Neo | Status: ⚪ Waiting / 🟡 Coding / 🟢 PR Open / 🔴 Blocked |
| PR | PR number (link) or empty |
| CI | 🟢 Passed / 🔴 Errors / ⚪ Empty |
| Merge | 🟢 Mergeable / 🔴 Not mergeable / ⚪ No PR |
| Age | Days since created (highlight if >7 days) |
| Assignee | neo / manual / empty |

### 3. Data Sources

- **Issues**: GitHub API `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues?state=open&labels=plan-me,status:in-progress,status:blocked`
- **CodeRabbit status**: Parse latest comment from `@coderabbitai` on each issue
- **PR status**: `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls?issue={issue_number}`
- **CI status**: `GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/commits/{sha}/status`
- **Merge status**: From PR response `mergeable` field

### 4. Repos to Track

1. `slideheroes/2025slideheroes-sophie` (fork - show issues from this repo)
2. `slideheroes/slideheroes-internal-tools`
3. `slideheroes/roadmap`

### 5. UX Details

- Cards default to collapsed (show repo name + issue count)
- Expand/collapse on click
- Sort by Age descending (oldest first)
- Traffic light colors:
  - Green 🟢 = good
  - Yellow 🟡 = in progress / needs attention
  - Red 🔴 = blocked / failed
  - Gray ⚪ = not applicable / empty

### 6. Empty State

If no active issues in a repo, show "No active issues" in the table area.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Roadmap/Launch/Product Velocity cards removed
- [ ] 3 collapsible repo cards render
- [ ] Each card shows table with active issues
- [ ] All columns populate from GitHub API
- [ ] Traffic lights display correctly
- [ ] Expand/collapse works
- [ ] Empty state shows when no issues

## Priority

Medium — useful for pipeline visibility but not blocking.

---
**Labels:** plan-me
**Project:** Mission Control
**Initiative:** Cockpit Improvements
